ProLuxe Travel

Direct contact. By introduction.

Hotels for your principal, their team, and your conferences.

Multi-city itineraries for one. Hotels for the principal plus team. Group programmes at conference scale. One person on point.

From the founder

By introduction. By hand.

A note from Myles ↓

I founded ProLuxe Travel for a small number of principals whose travel cannot afford to fail.

After 20 years on the floor of luxury hotels, the work narrows to two things: who you know, and being there when it matters. By the time your principal arrives, the people at the hotel who matter already know them. The room is as it should be before they ask.

Whether the principal is travelling alone or with twenty, the work lives in ProLuxe Bureau. A live view across hotels and cities for your office, a private link for each attendee. See how it works for your office or for a programme.

The team's work has ranged from 1,800 rooms across 11 hotels in one city for a corporate association, down to 4-city C-suite trips coast-to-coast.

I would be glad to be on hand for your office. If the time finds you, please write.

Write to Myles See Bureau for an office → See Bureau for a programme →

With my best regards,

Myles Longfield

Founder, ProLuxe Travel

London, April 2026

myles@proluxetravels.com

+44 20 7088 8291
